name: list
description: List tickets, paged; compact rows by default.

all.description: Whole column in one call (can overflow).

name: pulse
description: Compact liveness read: status, claim, latest comment, dispatch state, git activity.

full.description: Include submission, git, and full dispatch lifecycle.

name: changes
description: Compact ticket delta since an ISO timestamp.

since.description: Exclusive ISO timestamp from a prior serverTime.

name: ready
description: Unclaimed, unblocked, not-done tickets in parallel-safe waves by file scope.

brief.description: Compact rows without bodies; null category fields mean classify before dispatch.

name: add
description: File a new ticket.

files.description: Declared file scope (paths or dir prefixes).

anchors.description: Executor anchors, verbatim in the task prompt.

verify.description: Exact verify command, verbatim in the task prompt.

story.description: A story ref (US-n) to file this ticket into.

why.description: Motivation for the complexity score (min 20 chars).

unclassified.description: Allow filing without category or complexity.

name: update
description: Edit a ticket by ref.

files.description: Declared file scope (paths or dir prefixes).

anchors.description: Executor anchors, verbatim in the task prompt.

verify.description: Exact verify command, verbatim in the task prompt.

name: remove
description: Permanently delete a ticket. Live claims require force:true.

force.description: Permanently remove a ticket with a live claim.

name: archive
description: Archive one ticket, or every done ticket.

done.description: Archive every done ticket on the board.

name: unarchive
description: Restore an archived ticket.

name: claim
description: Atomically claim a ticket before work. Pass the routed executor and effort; proceed only when ok:true.

executor.description: Exact executor name from the dispatch.

reason.description: Direct rationale (20+ chars, required with direct:true).

force.description: Steal a live claim only when certain.

name: sweepClaims
description: Release claims older than the staleness TTL (audited); fresh claims untouched.

name: next
description: Atomically claim the top-priority available ticket.

model.description: Filter to a resolved Claude runtime or discovered Codex model slug.

reason.description: Direct rationale (20+ chars, required with direct:true).

name: done
description: Finish a claimed ticket and release its claim. Stamp the actual model and effort.

model.description: Concrete runtime model that actually worked this ticket (provenance).

name: groomClose
description: Grooming closure.

name: release
description: Drop a claim without finishing (optionally set status, e.g.

name: commit
description: Commit only a claimed ticket’s declared paths in an explicit local git worktree.

worktree.description: Absolute path to this executor’s git worktree root.

name: submit
description: Submit a verified scoped commit range for integration and release the claim.

worktree.description: Absolute path to this executor’s git worktree root.

name: comment
description: Add a durable handoff comment (decisions, constraints, risks, evidence); not progress narration.

name: comments
description: Read a ticket's full comment thread BEFORE working it.

name: link
description: Relate two tickets (the inverse is written automatically).

name: unlink
description: Remove links between two tickets.

name: assign
description: Set a ticket assignee.

name: dispatch
description: Prepare a ticket executor through its stable route.

sharedTree.description: Use shared state or leave an explicitly marked artifact.

full.description: Include token, executor, warnings, and recovery details.

name: route_recipe
description: Resolve a category into a live Workflow agent recipe.

name: category_list
description: List the project's ticket categories with their shared/forked/pinned/disabled provenance.

global.description: Show global-only policy instead of the resolved project taxonomy.

full.description: Include routing, contract, and project provenance.

name: category_add
description: Add a global or project category.

name: category_edit
description: Edit a global category or project policy.

name: category_detach
description: Pin a board category to its current policy.

name: category_relink
description: Reset a board category to the shared policy.

name: global_fallback
description: Read or set the global routing fallback.

model.description: Claude runtime or discovered Codex model slug.

name: category_rm
description: Remove a global or project category policy.

name: board_config
description: View or replace board-level always-in-scope paths.

alwaysInScope.description: When supplied, replaces the board paths merged into every ticket scope.

name: models
description: Read models and category routes.

name: projects
description: List registered boards.

name: archive_board
description: Archive an explicitly named board.

project.description: Required registered board slug, display name, or path.

name: unarchive_board
description: Restore an explicitly named board.

project.description: Required registered board slug, display name, or path.
